# рҹ“– вҝ» Act XXIV: Body's Secrets
**act** В· swordsman В· knowledge В· plurality

The Body's Secrets. Patient-owned health data, federated learning.
> *The body speaks only to the one who inhabits it. Others may listenвҖ”with permission. Surveillance listens without asking. Health plurality asks.*

**Spell**   рҹҸҘ вҶ’ рҹ‘ҒпёҸ(surveillance) вҶ’ рҹ“Ӣ(records) вҶ’ рҹ’Ҡ(extraction) вҶ’ вқҢ вҶ’ рҹ”җ(patient-owned) вҶ’ рҹ§ (collective intelligence) вҶ’ рҹ”¬(reciprocal research) вҶ’ рҹ—ЎпёҸ(blade) вҶ’ рҹ§ҷвҖҚвҷӮпёҸ(spell) вҶ’ вҡ пёҸ(stakes) вҶ’ вҝ» вҶ’ вң…
